justification module

src.justification.generate_justification(ticket, classe)[source]

Generate a natural language justification for a predicted ticket class.

This function uses a large language model to explain why a given ticket was classified into a specific category.

Parameters:

  • ticket (str) – The original ticket text.

  • classe (str) – Predicted ticket category.

Returns:

A short explanation describing why the ticket belongs to the predicted class.

Return type:

str

Example:

from src.justification import generate_justification

explanation = generate_justification(
    "Cannot connect to VPN",
    "network_issue"
)

print(explanation)
